subcodes.title: Words spoken at Haifa Pilgrim House, 1920-11-06
subcodes.first_line: Last night I visited the Mufti, the spiritual head of the Muslims... When I speak it is in such a manner that no one can object... It is written that Socrates went to other lands; they do not say that he did not leave Greece
subcodes.subjects: @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @predictions and prophecies, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @oneness; unity of religion, @stories; anecdotes
